description: CompositionWhite round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a softly ribbed neckline that has a fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand logo printed at the back of the neck and graphic print on the frontFittingSlimWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean If you are the queen of every party, then this t-shirt from puma is definitely made to define you. Let your hair down and get ready to rock steady in this cotton tee. Pair it with a short skirt and pump shoes for a cute party look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
